examples: Only by doing so can we maintain the vigor and vitality of our nation.
Many come through periods of stress with more physical and mental vigor than they had before.
In government laboratories and elsewhere, scientists are seeking a drug able to prolong life and youthful vigor.
So do strange ones, like the Vigor poster that depicts a tiger with his fangs around a tire.
It is also an important day to look forward with renewed optimism and vigor.
